http.reason: To search & fetch your lyrics from Shazam

shazam_search_country.title: Search Country
shazam_search_country.description: ISO country code used when searching Shazam. Set this to your country for best results.

shazam_language.title: Language
shazam_language.description: Preferred language code for lyrics results.

shazam_search_limit.title: Search Result Limit
shazam_search_limit.description: Maximum number of search results fetched from Shazam.

shazam_search_levenshtein_threshold.title: Match Threshold
shazam_search_levenshtein_threshold.description: Minimum Levenshtein similarity (0–1) required to accept a Shazam result as a match.

shazam_user_agent.title: User-Agent
shazam_user_agent.default: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_7 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/18.3 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
shazam_user_agent.description: User-Agent header sent to Shazam. The default mimics mobile Safari.

shazam_cookie.title: Cookie Header
shazam_cookie.description: Raw Cookie header value. Optional — set this to use a specific Shazam session or work around rate limits.
